title: adonis flammea
intro: Adonis flammea, also known as the flame-colored Adonis or false hellebore, is a flowering plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, Adonis flammea has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions due to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Adonis flammea is often prepared in herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
